caption: A man with dark hair and a light-colored headset microphone is seated in a studio setting, speaking while facing slightly to his left. He is wearing a blue button-down shirt with a small logo on the left chest that reads "NEOOBJECTS". Behind him is a light-colored wall featuring the text "theCUBE" in a bold font, with "the" in a smaller, lighter style and "CUBE" in a larger, dark blue font. Below this, the text "siliconANGLE" is written in a thinner, spaced-out typeface. To the man's right, a blue 3D cube sculpture sits on a dark table, next to a dark-colored folder or notebook. Across the frames, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expression slightly as he talks, while the background and surrounding objects remain static.
